title: Quilt Deathswap
body:
## What is Deathswap

Deathswap is a minigame where the players are far apart and every so often, players swap to each other. The goal is to be the last player alive by setting up traps for players to die when they swap to you.

## Credits

+ Seth Bling — [Original concept](https://youtu.be/r5rEaHPt6mw)
+ Gaming32 — Developer of this mod
+ wagyourtail — Developer of this mod
+ Earthcomputer — Contributer to this mod
